form.heading: Join Our Loyalty Programme
form.subheading: Enter your phone number and we'll send you a personalised link via WhatsApp. Add your email to also receive it by email.
form.error_phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number.

form.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.heading: Link Sent!
success.subheading: Review link shared to WhatsApp successfully.
